title: echinocereus fendleri var. boyce-thompsonii
intro: Echinocereus fendleri var. boyce-thompsonii, also known as the Boyce Thompson Hedgehog Cactus, is a unique and rare species of cactus native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Echinocereus fendleri var. boyce-thompsonii include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make salves, ointments, and tinctures, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
